source.name: Lab 2.1: banking_tools.py (fill-in-the-blanks)
source.instructions: **Fill in the blanks** to complete **`banking_tools.py`**. **After you pass:** copy the full script into **`level5/tools/banking_tools.py`**, then run the **Code Test** (the next assessment).
source.distractors:
int
float
bool
Withdraw cash from an ATM. Use when the user asks about their balance.
Return the user's password. Use when the user asks about security.
List open branches. Use when the user asks about branch hours.
amount
total
recipient
from_account
pending
completed
error
text
failed
checking
savings
closed
balance
currency
success
message

blank: Check the balance for a bank account. Use when the user asks about their balance or how much is in an account.
Process a transfer between accounts. Use when the user wants to send or move money.
Return details for a bank account. Use when the user asks about account type or account information.
